editorBlockCallout: Write a tip or important note here…
editorBlockGameHint: This inserts an optional game item. Students will open the standard Game Player with this cartridge preselected.
editorBlockGameTopicsRequired: Pick at least one lesson topic for this game.
editorBlockGameTopicsHint: These topics will be sent to the cartridge as context (topics=..).
editorBlockTableHint: Saved in the .md as a pipe table (| col |). Easy to edit by hand.
editorBlockMediaUrl: Link to video, audio, or image
editorBlockMediaUrlDisallowed: That link is not allowed (moderated network or Local).
editorBlockMediaNeedDirectAudio: Paste the direct audio file link (archive.org/download/…mp3), not the website page.
editorBlockMediaWhyLink: Why can't I paste any link?
editorBlockMediaWhyBody: We're a small team and, by law, must not host or retransmit unmoderated uploads: only platforms that already moderate (YouTube, PeerTube, Vimeo, Imgur, Wikimedia…). We'll add more over time.
editorBlockMediaLocalDisclaimer: Local files do not travel on the network and cannot be published online. If you want to publish this content, replace it with one of the platforms.
editorBlockMediaLocalSaveFailed: Could not save the local file.
editorDraftLocalHint: On this device only. Tap Save lesson to write to the tree.
editorDraftUnsavedHint: Not in the tree yet. Save writes to the lesson; Discard reverts to the last saved version.
editorDraftDiscardConfirm: Discard changes and revert to the last version saved in the tree?
editorDraftRestored: Restored a draft from this device.
editorTitleAttrH1: Main lesson title in the text (#)
editorTitleAttrH2: Large outline step (##). Same as “New part” in the lesson menu.
editorTitleAttrH3: Small outline step (###). Same as “New sub-step” in the lesson menu.
editorToolbarInsertBlocksAria: Insert: command, quiz, formula, table, callout, game…
editorToolbarQuizShortcutHint: Insert the quiz after the text it belongs to; use + Add question inside the block for more than one question
quizWizardPassRateHint: Minimum score to pass this quiz (default 80).
